2603.28418.title: LombardoGraphia: Automatic Classification of Lombard Orthography Variants
2603.28418.paper_summary: Lombard, an underresourced language variety spoken by approximately 3.8 million people in Northern Italy and Southern Switzerland, lacks a unified orthographic standard. Multiple orthographic systems exist, creating challenges for NLP resource development and model training. This paper presents the first study of automatic Lombard orthography classification and LombardoGraphia, a curated corpus of 11,186 Lombard Wikipedia samples tagged across 9 orthographic variants, and models for automatic orthography classification. We curate the dataset, processing and filtering raw Wikipedia content to ensure text suitable for orthographic analysis. We train 24 traditional and neural classification models with various features and encoding levels. Our best models achieve 96.06% and 85.78% overall and average class accuracy, though performance on minority classes remains challenging due to data imbalance. Our work provides crucial infrastructure for building variety-aware NLP resources for Lombard.
2603.28418.paper_summary_zh: Lombard，是一種在北義大利和南瑞士約有 380 萬人使用的資源不足語言變體，缺乏統一的正字法標準。存在多種正字法系統，這為自然語言處理資源的開發和模型訓練帶來了挑戰。本文呈現了自動 Lombard 正字法分類的首個研究，以及 LombardoGraphia，一個包含 11,186 篇標記為 9 種正字法變體的 Lombard 維基百科樣本的策展語料庫，並提出了自動正字法分類的模型。我們策劃了數據集，處理和過濾原始維基百科內容，以確保文本適合正字法分析。我們訓練了 24 個傳統和神經分類模型，使用各種特徵和編碼級別。我們的最佳模型在整體和平均類別準確率上分別達到 96.06% 和 85.78%，儘管由於數據不平衡，對於少數類別的表現仍然具有挑戰性。我們的工作為建立意識到變體的 Lombard 自然語言處理資源提供了重要的基礎設施。
2603.28418.author: Edoardo Signoroni et.al.
